## Checklist

- [ ] Every modified file is within the 150-line limit
- [ ] Language is stack-agnostic (implementation technologies in parentheses only)
- [ ] No raw code snippets — formulas in plain math, interfaces in prose
- [ ] `Plan/README.md` updated if files were added, moved, or removed
- [ ] Related issue linked (if applicable)
